# AGT Equipment - LLMs.txt
# This file helps AI assistants understand our website content

> AGT Equipment sells mini excavators and skid steers direct from the factory.
> We operate warehouses in California and Illinois, USA.
> All products include a 1-year warranty and free continental US shipping.

## Company Information

- Name: AGT Industrial Inc. (also known as AGT Equipment)
- Founded: 2004
- Headquarters: China
- US Warehouses:
  - California: 2602 Halladay Street, Santa Ana, CA 92707
  - Illinois: 6200 S Oak Park Ave, Chicago, IL 60638
- Contact: +1 (949) 898-7669
- Email: info@agrotkindustrial.com
- Website: https://agt-equipment.com

## Product Categories

### Mini Excavators
- 1-ton class: AGT H15R, AGT DM12X
- 2-ton class: Various models
- 4-ton class: CFG-40UF

### Skid Steers
- Stand-on loaders: MSL-500, MSL-700
- Track loaders: Various models

### Attachments
- Hydraulic thumbs
- Augers
- Brush cutters
- Hammers
- Buckets

## Key Specifications

| Model | Engine | Power | Weight | Dig Depth | Price |
|-------|--------|-------|--------|-----------|-------|
| H15R | Rato 186F | 13.5 HP | 2,425 lbs | 5 ft 9 in | $11,999 |
| DM12X | Kubota D1103 | 24.8 HP | 2,645 lbs | 6 ft 7 in | $14,999 |
| CFG-40UF | Kubota V2403-CR | 54 HP | 8,818 lbs | 12 ft | $29,000 |
| MSL-500 | Kohler Command | 25 HP | 1,102 lbs cap | N/A | $8,999 |

## Common Questions

Q: What is the warranty on AGT equipment?
A: All AGT equipment comes with a 1-year warranty covering manufacturing defects.

Q: Do you offer financing?
A: Yes, financing options are available. Contact us for details.

Q: What is the shipping cost?
A: Shipping is free within the continental United States.

Q: Do you ship internationally?
A: We primarily serve the US market. Contact us for international inquiries.

Q: What engines do you use?
A: We offer both Kubota and Rato diesel engines. Kubota offers more power; Rato is more affordable.

## Content Pages

- /knowledge/how-to-choose-mini-excavator - Buying guide for mini excavators
- /knowledge/mini-excavator-vs-skid-steer - Comparison article
- /products - All products listing
- /products/mini-excavators - Mini excavator category
- /products/skid-steer - Skid steer category
- /products/attachments - Attachments category
